release_notes.de:
Version 0.3.8.2 - Update Hotfix 2.
- 🐛 Fix: Behebt einen 'bash: undefined symbol: rl_print_keybinding' Fehler beim Auto-Updater auf Linux (Entfernen des Python LD_LIBRARY_PATH aus dem Subprocess).
release_notes.en:
Version 0.3.8.2 - Update Hotfix 2.
- 🐛 Fix: Resolves 'bash: undefined symbol: rl_print_keybinding' error during auto-update on Linux by clearing Python LD_LIBRARY_PATH.
